_note: ILLUSTRATIVE ONLY — this is a plausible but fabricated manifest for the spike. No real teacher-workspace component library was accessed. Component names, import paths, and props are representative of a Base UI + shadcn-style stack; they do not reflect actual teacher-workspace source.

components.name: Button
components.props_summary: Primary action trigger; variants: primary, secondary, ghost, destructive, link; sizes: sm, md, lg; supports loading state via isLoading prop.
replaces: hand-rolled loading spinner inside a div

components.name: Dialog
components.props_summary: Modal overlay with header, body, footer slots; traps focus; closes on Escape; composed from Base UI Dialog primitives.

components.name: Toast
components.props_summary: Transient notification; variants: success, warning, error, info; auto-dismisses after 5s; stacks via Toaster provider.
replaces: alert div at top of page
fixed-position notification banner for transient feedback

components.name: EmptyState
components.props_summary: Zero-data placeholder with illustration slot, heading, body copy, and optional primary action; use for list views, search results, and filtered tables with no matches.
replaces: custom illustration + button built per screen

components.name: PageHeader
components.props_summary: Top-of-page shell with page title (Plus Jakarta Sans 600), optional subtitle, breadcrumb slot, and trailing action slot; sets the H1 for the view.

components.name: DataTable
components.props_summary: Sortable, paginated table with column config, row selection, and empty-state slot; built on TanStack Table; handles loading skeleton internally.
replaces: hand-rolled HTML table with custom sort

components.name: FormField
components.props_summary: Composes Label + Input (or Select/Textarea) + HelperText + ErrorMessage into a single accessible form row; associates label programmatically; satisfies A11Y-3 by construction.
replaces: input with sibling label not programmatically associated

components.name: DatePicker
components.props_summary: Text input + calendar popover for date selection; supports single date and range modes; keyboard-navigable calendar; formats dates per locale.

components.name: Tabs
components.props_summary: ARIA-compliant tab list + tab panels; variants: underline (default), pill; controlled and uncontrolled modes.

components.name: Banner
components.props_summary: Persistent in-page alert strip; variants: info, success, warning, error; optional dismiss; use for page-level status that persists across actions (not transient — use Toast for that).
replaces: alert div with hardcoded background colour

components.name: Select
components.props_summary: Accessible custom select (not native <select>); supports search, multi-select, and grouped options; built on Base UI Select.

components.name: ConfirmDialog
components.props_summary: Dialog pre-wired for destructive action confirmation: title, consequence copy, cancel button, and confirm (destructive variant Button); satisfies CMP-2 by construction.

components.name: LoadingSpinner
components.props_summary: Full-page or inline spinner. DEPRECATED: use Button isLoading prop for button states, or Skeleton for content loading. LoadingSpinner remains only for legacy full-page loading gates being migrated.

components.name: Skeleton
components.props_summary: Content placeholder shown during async load; shapes: text line, circle, rectangle; respects prefers-reduced-motion (satisfies A11Y-5 by construction).

components.name: RichTextEditor
components.props_summary: Full-featured prose editor (Tiptap-based); supports headings, lists, bold/italic, and link insertion. RESTRICTED: heavy bundle impact (~120 kB gzipped); use only on pages where rich formatting is a core user need. Requires CMP-1 waiver citing the use case.
